summary: Iteration 158 - Mobile UI Bug Fixes and Push Notifications Testing. All tests PASSED. Verified duplicate navbar/footer fix on Services, Care, and Home pages. Backend APIs for user tickets, bookings, and push notifications working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ServicesPage.jsx: Duplicate Navbar/Footer imports removed - only 1 navbar and 1 footer now visible on mobile
Care page: Only 1 navbar at top, no duplicates
Home page: Mobile layout correct with single navbar
My Tickets page: Shows login prompt correctly when not logged in
/api/user/tickets: Returns user tickets correctly (tested with dipali@clubconcierge.in)
/api/user/bookings: Returns user bookings correctly (2 bookings found)
/api/push/vapid-public-key: Returns valid VAPID public key for push notifications
MiraChatWidget visible on all pages with 'Ask Mira' label
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile UI duplicate navbar bug is FIXED. Services, Care, and Home pages all show single navbar on mobile (390x844 viewport). Push notification infrastructure is in place with VAPID key endpoint working. User tickets and bookings APIs working correctly.

mobile_ui_tests.services_page_navbar: PASS - Only 1 nav element found, no duplicates
mobile_ui_tests.services_page_content: PASS - 86 service cards displayed, pillar filters working
mobile_ui_tests.care_page_navbar: PASS - Only 1 nav element found, no duplicates
mobile_ui_tests.care_page_content: PASS - Care hero section and services visible
mobile_ui_tests.home_page_navbar: PASS - Only 1 nav element found, no duplicates
mobile_ui_tests.home_page_content: PASS - Hero section visible with 'Pet Life Operating System' text
mobile_ui_tests.my_tickets_page_login_prompt: PASS - Shows 'View Your Tickets' with login prompt when not logged in

backend_api_tests.push_vapid_key_api: PASS - GET /api/push/vapid-public-key returns valid VAPID public key
backend_api_tests.login_api: PASS - POST /api/auth/login returns access_token and user data
